appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: Browser (agent-browser) section with isolation rules, concurrency limits, and shared state avoidance for foundation assertions

frictions.description: Theme toggle is not available on the login page — only appears on authenticated pages (Portal Hub, portal layouts). Required login to test theme behavior.
Sidebar active link uses text-white (Tailwind utility) instead of a CSS variable for text color. Not a hardcoded hex, but could be improved for consistency.

VAL-FOUNDATION-001.summary: Button components (.lp-btn, .btn-primary, .btn-secondary) use CSS variables (var(--color-neutral-900), var(--color-surface-primary), etc.) for all color properties. No hardcoded hex colors found.

VAL-FOUNDATION-002.summary: Login email input (.lp-input) uses CSS variables for border (var(--color-border-default)), background (var(--color-surface-primary)), color (var(--color-text-primary)), and focus state (var(--color-neutral-900)).

VAL-FOUNDATION-003.summary: Command palette (Ctrl+K) opens as centered modal with backdrop overlay (bg-black/20, backdrop-blur-[2px]). Has proper ARIA attributes (role=dialog, aria-modal=true). Escape key dismisses correctly.

VAL-FOUNDATION-004.summary: Users DataTable renders 5 column headers and 6 data rows with pagination. Responsive: table view at desktop/tablet widths with overflow-x-auto, card-based layout on mobile (375px).

VAL-FOUNDATION-005.summary: Audited 5 elements (quick action button, sidebar active link, KPI card, page heading, theme toggle). All use var(--color-*) CSS variables. Only Tailwind reset/preflight rules contain hex values (framework internals).

VAL-FOUNDATION-006.summary: Dark mode toggle adds 'dark' class to html element. Background switches rgb(250,250,250)→rgb(17,17,17), text rgb(23,23,23)→rgb(250,250,250). Text fully readable in both modes.

VAL-FOUNDATION-007.summary: Theme preference stored in localStorage key 'o-theme'. Dark mode persists across page reload — html retains dark class and dark color scheme.

VAL-FOUNDATION-008.summary: Vite dev server proxies API calls correctly. Login succeeds through proxy without CORS errors. curl tests confirm identical responses from localhost:3002 (proxy) and localhost:8081 (direct backend).

VAL-FOUNDATION-009.summary: Build produces 6 portal chunks (accounting 380KB, admin 157KB, sales 178KB, factory 153KB, superadmin 97KB, dealer 60KB) and 4 vendor chunks (react 207KB, misc 72KB, date 23KB, router 14KB).

VAL-FOUNDATION-010.summary: Dead routes (/nonexistent-portal) handled gracefully: redirects to /hub when authenticated, /login when unauthenticated. No blank screen.
